creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
> KDE ▶ Audio Volume (widget) ▶ Applications ▶ Playback Streams 
>> AudioStream: %2(I18N_ARGUMENT_MISSING)

Neither www/firefox nor audio/pulseaudio define I18N_ARGUMENT_MISSING. Off to kde@ to investigate as I don't know which port provides "Audio Volume (widget)".
